scripts.deploy-pages: cd website && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy out
scripts.reload:daemon: cargo build -p localdomain-daemon --release && sudo cp target/release/localdomain-daemon /usr/local/bin/localdomain-daemon && sudo launchctl kickstart -k system/com.localdomain.daemon
scripts.build:all: npm run build:daemon && npx tauri build
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:daemon && npx tauri build --bundles dmg
